title: Overhead View of Colorful Plant-Based Meal Prep in Glass Containers
description: Overhead shot of vibrant plant-based meal prep with glass containers filled with fresh vegetables, grains, legumes, and herbs arranged neatly on a rustic wooden kitchen counter. Bright natural lighting highlights the colorful and fresh ingredients including leafy greens, cherry tomatoes, carrots, cucumbers, chickpeas, broccoli, sweet potatoes, and various grains. The clean kitchen setting includes potted herbs, a wooden cutting board with a knife, and a reusable water bottle, emphasizing healthy and organized meal preparation.
